title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at ICICI Bank International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at ICICI Bank International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
ICICI Bank International Enterprises invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Risk Analyst at our Kochi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About ICICI Bank International Enterprises:
ICICI Bank International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Bank International Enterprises!
